name: coTfsSDOBlockInit
title: coTfsSDOBlockInit
syntax: long coTfsSDOBlockInit( dword index, dword subIndex, dword ccs, dword cs, dword crcSupported, dword sizeIndicated, dword blkSize, dword size, dword threshold );
description: This function starts a SDO block download or SDO block upload and waits for the corresponding response.
